content.json:
## Application Gateway Troubleshooting Dashboard (Basic)

Use this workbook to investigate Application Gateway access logs and identify errors. This version is for environments without extended App Gateway log fields (no listener, backend pool, or server-side columns).

parameters.name: Workspace
parameters.label: Log Analytics Workspace
parameters.query:
Resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces'
| order by name asc
| project id, label = name, selected = false, group = resourceGroup

parameters.name: ApplicationGateway
parameters.label: Application Gateway
parameters.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == 'ApplicationGatewayAccessLog'
| distinct Resource
| order by Resource asc
| project value = Resource, label = Resource

parameters.name: HttpStatus
parameters.label: HTTP Status
parameters.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == 'ApplicationGatewayAccessLog'
| where '*' in ({ApplicationGateway}) or Resource in ({ApplicationGateway})
| extend StatusCode = tostring(toint(httpStatus_d))
| distinct StatusCode
| order by StatusCode asc
| project value = StatusCode, label = StatusCode

content.json:
### Overview
High-level summary of Application Gateway traffic and errors for the selected filters.

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == 'ApplicationGatewayAccessLog'
| where '*' in ({ApplicationGateway}) or Resource in ({ApplicationGateway})
| where '*' in ({HttpStatus}) or tostring(toint(httpStatus_d)) in ({HttpStatus})
| summarize
    TotalRequests = count(),
    FailedRequests = countif(httpStatus_d >= 400),
    AvgLatencyMs = round(avg(timeTaken_d), 2),
    P95LatencyMs = round(percentile(timeTaken_d, 95), 2),
    UniqueClients = dcount(clientIP_s),
    TotalSentMB = round(sum(sentBytes_d) / 1048576.0, 2),
    TotalReceivedMB = round(sum(receivedBytes_d) / 1048576.0, 2)
| project Metric = pack_array('Total Requests', 'Failed Requests', 'Avg Latency (ms)', 'P95 Latency (ms)', 'Unique Clients', 'Sent (MB)', 'Received (MB)'), Value = pack_array(TotalRequests, FailedRequests, AvgLatencyMs, P95LatencyMs, UniqueClients, TotalSentMB, TotalReceivedMB)
| mv-expand Metric to typeof(string), Value to typeof(real)
content.title: Key Metrics

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == 'ApplicationGatewayAccessLog'
| where '*' in ({ApplicationGateway}) or Resource in ({ApplicationGateway})
| where '*' in ({HttpStatus}) or tostring(toint(httpStatus_d)) in ({HttpStatus})
| summarize Count = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain}), StatusCategory = case(
    httpStatus_d < 300, '2xx Success',
    httpStatus_d < 400, '3xx Redirect',
    httpStatus_d < 500, '4xx Client Error',
    '5xx Server Error')
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Request Volume by Status Category

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == 'ApplicationGatewayAccessLog'
| where '*' in ({ApplicationGateway}) or Resource in ({ApplicationGateway})
| where '*' in ({HttpStatus}) or tostring(toint(httpStatus_d)) in ({HttpStatus})
| summarize Requests = count(), Errors = countif(httpStatus_d >= 400), ErrorRate = round(100.0 * countif(httpStatus_d >= 400) / count(), 2) by Resource
| order by Errors desc
content.title: Requests by Application Gateway

content.json:
### Error Analysis
Breakdown of errors by HTTP status code and request URI to help pinpoint the source of failures.

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == 'ApplicationGatewayAccessLog'
| where '*' in ({ApplicationGateway}) or Resource in ({ApplicationGateway})
| where '*' in ({HttpStatus}) or tostring(toint(httpStatus_d)) in ({HttpStatus})
| where httpStatus_d >= 400
| summarize Count = count() by HttpStatus = tostring(toint(httpStatus_d))
| order by Count desc
content.title: Errors by HTTP Status Code

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == 'ApplicationGatewayAccessLog'
| where '*' in ({ApplicationGateway}) or Resource in ({ApplicationGateway})
| where '*' in ({HttpStatus}) or tostring(toint(httpStatus_d)) in ({HttpStatus})
| where httpStatus_d >= 400
| summarize Count = count() by HttpStatus = tostring(toint(httpStatus_d))
| order by Count desc
content.title: Errors by HTTP Status Code

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == 'ApplicationGatewayAccessLog'
| where '*' in ({ApplicationGateway}) or Resource in ({ApplicationGateway})
| where '*' in ({HttpStatus}) or tostring(toint(httpStatus_d)) in ({HttpStatus})
| where httpStatus_d >= 400
| summarize Errors = count() by host_s, requestUri_s, httpMethod_s, HttpStatus = tostring(toint(httpStatus_d))
| order by Errors desc
| take 50
content.title: Top Errors by Host and URI

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == 'ApplicationGatewayAccessLog'
| where '*' in ({ApplicationGateway}) or Resource in ({ApplicationGateway})
| where '*' in ({HttpStatus}) or tostring(toint(httpStatus_d)) in ({HttpStatus})
| where httpStatus_d >= 400
| summarize Count = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain}), HttpStatus = tostring(toint(httpStatus_d))
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Errors Over Time

content.json:
### Request Details
Drill down into individual requests matching the selected filters. Use this to investigate specific incidents.

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == 'ApplicationGatewayAccessLog'
| where '*' in ({ApplicationGateway}) or Resource in ({ApplicationGateway})
| where '*' in ({HttpStatus}) or tostring(toint(httpStatus_d)) in ({HttpStatus})
| summarize Requests = count(), Errors = countif(httpStatus_d >= 400) by host_s, requestUri_s, httpMethod_s
| order by Errors desc, Requests desc
| take 50
content.title: Top Requested URIs

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == 'ApplicationGatewayAccessLog'
| where '*' in ({ApplicationGateway}) or Resource in ({ApplicationGateway})
| where '*' in ({HttpStatus}) or tostring(toint(httpStatus_d)) in ({HttpStatus})
| summarize Requests = count(), Errors = countif(httpStatus_d >= 400), AvgLatencyMs = round(avg(timeTaken_d), 2) by clientIP_s
| order by Errors desc, Requests desc
| take 50
content.title: Top Client IPs

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == 'ApplicationGatewayAccessLog'
| where '*' in ({ApplicationGateway}) or Resource in ({ApplicationGateway})
| where '*' in ({HttpStatus}) or tostring(toint(httpStatus_d)) in ({HttpStatus})
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    Resource,
    clientIP_s,
    httpMethod_s,
    host_s,
    requestUri_s,
    HttpStatus = toint(httpStatus_d),
    timeTaken_d,
    sslEnabled_s,
    userAgent_s,
    clientPort_d,
    sentBytes_d,
    receivedBytes_d
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 250
content.title: Request Log (latest 250)

content.json:
### Timeline
Visualize traffic patterns, latency trends, and throughput over time.

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == 'ApplicationGatewayAccessLog'
| where '*' in ({ApplicationGateway}) or Resource in ({ApplicationGateway})
| where '*' in ({HttpStatus}) or tostring(toint(httpStatus_d)) in ({HttpStatus})
| summarize Requests = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain})
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Request Volume Over Time

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == 'ApplicationGatewayAccessLog'
| where '*' in ({ApplicationGateway}) or Resource in ({ApplicationGateway})
| where '*' in ({HttpStatus}) or tostring(toint(httpStatus_d)) in ({HttpStatus})
| summarize
    AvgLatency = avg(timeTaken_d),
    P50Latency = percentile(timeTaken_d, 50),
    P95Latency = percentile(timeTaken_d, 95),
    P99Latency = percentile(timeTaken_d, 99)
    by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain})
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Latency Percentiles Over Time (ms)

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == 'ApplicationGatewayAccessLog'
| where '*' in ({ApplicationGateway}) or Resource in ({ApplicationGateway})
| where '*' in ({HttpStatus}) or tostring(toint(httpStatus_d)) in ({HttpStatus})
| summarize
    SentMB = round(sum(sentBytes_d) / 1048576.0, 2),
    ReceivedMB = round(sum(receivedBytes_d) / 1048576.0, 2)
    by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain})
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Throughput Over Time (MB)

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == 'ApplicationGatewayAccessLog'
| where '*' in ({ApplicationGateway}) or Resource in ({ApplicationGateway})
| where '*' in ({HttpStatus}) or tostring(toint(httpStatus_d)) in ({HttpStatus})
| summarize Requests = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain}), host_s
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Requests by Host Over Time

content.json:
### WAF Analysis
Web Application Firewall evaluation data extracted from the `AdditionalFields` column in `ApplicationGatewayAccessLog`.

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == 'ApplicationGatewayAccessLog'
| where '*' in ({ApplicationGateway}) or Resource in ({ApplicationGateway})
| extend AF = parse_json(AdditionalFields)
| extend WAFMode = tostring(AF.WAFMode)
| where isnotempty(WAFMode)
| summarize
    WAFEvaluatedRequests = count(),
    AvgWAFEvalTimeSec = round(avg(todouble(AF.WAFEvaluationTime)), 4),
    P95WAFEvalTimeSec = round(percentile(todouble(AF.WAFEvaluationTime), 95), 4),
    UniqueClients = dcount(clientIP_s),
    FailedRequests = countif(httpStatus_d >= 400)
| project Metric = pack_array('WAF Evaluated Requests', 'Failed Requests', 'Unique Clients', 'Avg WAF Eval Time (s)', 'P95 WAF Eval Time (s)'), Value = pack_array(WAFEvaluatedRequests, FailedRequests, UniqueClients, AvgWAFEvalTimeSec, P95WAFEvalTimeSec)
| mv-expand Metric to typeof(string), Value to typeof(real)
content.title: WAF Summary

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == 'ApplicationGatewayAccessLog'
| where '*' in ({ApplicationGateway}) or Resource in ({ApplicationGateway})
| extend AF = parse_json(AdditionalFields)
| extend WAFMode = tostring(AF.WAFMode), WAFPolicyID = tostring(AF.WAFPolicyID)
| where isnotempty(WAFMode)
| summarize Requests = count(), AvgWAFEvalTimeSec = round(avg(todouble(AF.WAFEvaluationTime)), 4) by WAFMode, WAFPolicy = extract(@'/([^/]+)$', 1, WAFPolicyID)
| order by Requests desc
content.title: Requests by WAF Mode and Policy

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == 'ApplicationGatewayAccessLog'
| where '*' in ({ApplicationGateway}) or Resource in ({ApplicationGateway})
| extend AF = parse_json(AdditionalFields)
| extend WAFMode = tostring(AF.WAFMode)
| where isnotempty(WAFMode)
| summarize AvgWAFEvalTimeSec = avg(todouble(AF.WAFEvaluationTime)) by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain})
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: WAF Evaluation Time Over Time

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == 'ApplicationGatewayAccessLog'
| where '*' in ({ApplicationGateway}) or Resource in ({ApplicationGateway})
| extend AF = parse_json(AdditionalFields)
| extend WAFMode = tostring(AF.WAFMode)
| where isnotempty(WAFMode)
| summarize Requests = count(), Errors = countif(httpStatus_d >= 400) by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain})
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: WAF-Evaluated Requests Over Time

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == 'ApplicationGatewayAccessLog'
| where '*' in ({ApplicationGateway}) or Resource in ({ApplicationGateway})
| extend AF = parse_json(AdditionalFields)
| extend WAFMode = tostring(AF.WAFMode), ErrorInfo = tostring(AF.error_info)
| where isnotempty(WAFMode)
| where httpStatus_d >= 400 or (isnotempty(ErrorInfo) and ErrorInfo != 'ERRORINFO_NO_ERROR')
| summarize Count = count() by clientIP_s, host_s, requestUri_s, HttpStatus = tostring(toint(httpStatus_d)), ErrorInfo
| order by Count desc
| take 50
content.title: WAF-Evaluated Requests with Errors

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == 'ApplicationGatewayAccessLog'
| where '*' in ({ApplicationGateway}) or Resource in ({ApplicationGateway})
| extend AF = parse_json(AdditionalFields)
| extend WAFMode = tostring(AF.WAFMode)
| where isnotempty(WAFMode)
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    Resource,
    clientIP_s,
    httpMethod_s,
    host_s,
    requestUri_s,
    HttpStatus = toint(httpStatus_d),
    WAFMode,
    WAFEvalTimeSec = tostring(AF.WAFEvaluationTime),
    WAFPolicy = extract(@'/([^/]+)$', 1, tostring(AF.WAFPolicyID)),
    ErrorInfo = tostring(AF.error_info),
    OriginalURI = tostring(AF.originalRequestUriWithArgs),
    TransactionId = tostring(AF.transactionId)
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 250
content.title: WAF Request Log (latest 250)

content.json:
### Extended Details (from AdditionalFields)
Data extracted from the `AdditionalFields` JSON in access logs — includes SSL, backend routing, error info, server latency, and connection details.

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == 'ApplicationGatewayAccessLog'
| where '*' in ({ApplicationGateway}) or Resource in ({ApplicationGateway})
| where '*' in ({HttpStatus}) or tostring(toint(httpStatus_d)) in ({HttpStatus})
| extend AF = parse_json(AdditionalFields)
| extend ErrorInfo = tostring(AF.error_info)
| where isnotempty(ErrorInfo)
| summarize Count = count() by ErrorInfo
| order by Count desc
content.title: Requests by Error Info

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == 'ApplicationGatewayAccessLog'
| where '*' in ({ApplicationGateway}) or Resource in ({ApplicationGateway})
| where '*' in ({HttpStatus}) or tostring(toint(httpStatus_d)) in ({HttpStatus})
| extend AF = parse_json(AdditionalFields)
| extend ErrorInfo = tostring(AF.error_info)
| where isnotempty(ErrorInfo) and ErrorInfo != 'ERRORINFO_NO_ERROR'
| summarize Count = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain}), ErrorInfo
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Errors Over Time (from AdditionalFields)

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == 'ApplicationGatewayAccessLog'
| where '*' in ({ApplicationGateway}) or Resource in ({ApplicationGateway})
| extend AF = parse_json(AdditionalFields)
| extend SslProtocol = tostring(AF.sslProtocol), SslCipher = tostring(AF.sslCipher)
| where isnotempty(SslProtocol)
| summarize Count = count() by SslProtocol, SslCipher
| order by Count desc
content.title: Client SSL/TLS Protocol and Cipher

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == 'ApplicationGatewayAccessLog'
| where '*' in ({ApplicationGateway}) or Resource in ({ApplicationGateway})
| extend AF = parse_json(AdditionalFields)
| extend BackendSslProtocol = tostring(AF.backendSslProtocol), BackendSslCipher = tostring(AF.backendSslCipher)
| where isnotempty(BackendSslProtocol)
| summarize Count = count() by BackendSslProtocol, BackendSslCipher
| order by Count desc
content.title: Backend SSL/TLS Protocol and Cipher

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == 'ApplicationGatewayAccessLog'
| where '*' in ({ApplicationGateway}) or Resource in ({ApplicationGateway})
| where '*' in ({HttpStatus}) or tostring(toint(httpStatus_d)) in ({HttpStatus})
| extend AF = parse_json(AdditionalFields)
| extend
    ServerRouted = tostring(AF.serverRouted),
    ServerStatus = tostring(AF.serverStatus),
    BackendPool = tostring(AF.backendPoolName),
    BackendSetting = tostring(AF.backendSettingName),
    Listener = tostring(AF.listenerName)
| where isnotempty(ServerRouted)
| summarize
    Requests = count(),
    Errors = countif(toint(ServerStatus) >= 400 or ServerStatus == '-'),
    AvgServerLatency = round(avg(todouble(AF.serverResponseLatency)) * 1000, 2),
    AvgConnectTime = round(avg(todouble(AF.serverConnectTime)) * 1000, 2),
    AvgHeaderTime = round(avg(todouble(AF.serverHeaderTime)) * 1000, 2)
    by ServerRouted, BackendPool, Listener
| order by Errors desc, Requests desc
content.title: Backend Server Performance (from AdditionalFields)

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == 'ApplicationGatewayAccessLog'
| where '*' in ({ApplicationGateway}) or Resource in ({ApplicationGateway})
| where '*' in ({HttpStatus}) or tostring(toint(httpStatus_d)) in ({HttpStatus})
| extend AF = parse_json(AdditionalFields)
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    Resource,
    clientIP_s,
    httpMethod_s,
    host_s,
    requestUri_s,
    HttpStatus = toint(httpStatus_d),
    OriginalURI = tostring(AF.originalRequestUriWithArgs),
    OriginalHost = tostring(AF.originalHost),
    ErrorInfo = tostring(AF.error_info),
    ServerRouted = tostring(AF.serverRouted),
    ServerStatus = tostring(AF.serverStatus),
    ServerLatency = tostring(AF.serverResponseLatency),
    ConnectTime = tostring(AF.serverConnectTime),
    HeaderTime = tostring(AF.serverHeaderTime),
    Listener = tostring(AF.listenerName),
    BackendPool = tostring(AF.backendPoolName),
    SslProtocol = tostring(AF.sslProtocol),
    SslCipher = tostring(AF.sslCipher),
    WAFMode = tostring(AF.WAFMode),
    TransactionId = tostring(AF.transactionId)
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 250
content.title: Extended Request Log (latest 250)
